\tzpentry{ID3403}{Coupled Quantum Wavefunction Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3403 introduces Coupled Quantum Wavefunction Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ i\hbar \frac{\partial \psi}{\partial t} = \hat{H} \psi \]
